§lWood Crates§r

§lOak Wood Crate§r
§8BLOCK§r
 
•§lRarity§r: Common
•§lGenerate naturally in§r: Plains, Forest, Windswept Hills, Beach, Stony Shore, Mushroom Fields surfaces.
•§lTrade by§r: Crates Trader
•§lCraftable§r: NO
•§lStackable§r: 64

•§lBlast Resistance§r: 15.0
•§lHardness§r: 2.0
•§lFlammable§r: YES
•§lMining Tool§r: Axe
•§lDrops on breaking§r: Oak Wood Crate
•§lCan be opened using§r: Flint Axe
